ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bug or issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the ticket */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., Bug report, Feature request) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ticket */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was resolved */,
  "closed_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "parent_ticket_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the tickets table */,
  "dependency_ids" TEXT /* Array of ticket IDs that this ticket depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_parent_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_closed_by FOREIGN KEY ("closed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the owner belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the owner is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Bug report, Feature request) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., normal, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the tickets table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status change, assignment change) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)
